## Summary

- What problem does this PR solve?
- Which part of the skill is updated?

## Musk Five-Step Mapping

- [ ] Step 1 Question: challenged the requirement and documented reason
- [ ] Step 2 Delete: removed redundant parts or justified why none deleted
- [ ] Step 3 Simplify: reduced complexity of surviving parts
- [ ] Step 4 Accelerate: improved cycle time or feedback loop
- [ ] Step 5 Automate: only automated stable/high-frequency work

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `make validate` in skill root
- [ ] Added/updated docs when behavior changed
- [ ] Included screenshots or example output when relevant

## Risk and Rollback

- Main risks:
- Rollback trigger:
